title: DBSA hit by ransomware attack. ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Bank was attacked using Akira ransomware by an unknown actor without any permissions or approves from our side.We are ready to provide any assistance needed to help DBSA recover it's systems and would like to ask their representative to contact us anytime.We are currently conducting an internal investigation to ensure that DBSA information is not leaked. A bank representative will beprovided with all the details of the incident.
